{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Ynthra system
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Ynthra system]] contains five [[Hives]] gathered by the [[Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Ynthra system,” Sola said. “The Legion has gathered five Hives here, and no one knows why.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
